description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a natural wood grain finish on the front soundboard and a contrasting black finish on the sides and back. The body features a single cutaway design, allowing easier access to the higher frets. The soundhole is round and bordered by a simple rosette, and the bridge is a standard black acoustic style with white bridge pins. The neck is straight and dark, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically, three on each side. The back and sides are glossy black, giving the instrument a classic and elegant appearance, while the front showcases the lighter wood grain typical of spruce or similar tonewoods.
description: A full-sized acoustic guitar with a natural wood grain front, black back and sides, and a single cutaway body. It features a round soundhole, black bridge, and a headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the natural wood grain soundboard, round soundhole, black pickguard, and bridge.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and glossy black finish on the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the entirely black, glossy back and neck, with the cutaway shape visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim body and black finish, with the cutaway contour evident.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple rectangular shape.
